content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.07% with VIX +8.7% to 18.31 — clear risk-off tape with PSU banks/Realty/Auto leading down. Pharma and FMCG showing defensive bid (TATACONSUM +9.5%, TORNTPHARM +3.9%, LAURUSLABS +5.7%, COFORGE +7.4%) on Q4 results. Book is 55% deployed across 14 names with several at +ve P&L — focus is on trailing winners and protecting capital ahead of CPI tomorrow.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "GOLDBEES -1.3%, CMP 123.50 vs SL 121.00. Safe-haven with VIX spiking; SL gives ~2% room. No change needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 838.00,
      "new_target": 880.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "MARICO +3.3% breaking 52w high on Q4 beat (PAT +18%, India volume +9%). SL already at 838 (breakeven+); raise target from 870 to 880 (MOFSL TP 950 leaves room). Keep SL at 838 — CMP 847, ~1.1% gap below CMP, respects trail-gap rule."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1365.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "COFORGE +9.6% on +134% PAT growth & Encora deal. CMP 1380 vs SL 1365 — gap is only 1.1%, on the floor. Stored SL 1365 already locks in ~+8.4% gain. Hold current SL (no tightening — moving higher would breach 1% gap rule); keep target 1500. Per Rule 12, no-op MODIFY would be redundant — emitting MODIFY only because stored SL is already trailed; reverting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SRF +1.0%, CMP 2814 vs SL 2740 (2.6% gap). Q4 pending May 21 — within 3-session binary window? No, 7 sessions away. Hold current levels."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 8950.00,
      "new_target": 9550.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "POLYCAB +0.1%, CMP 9097 at 52w high, 3.3x volume. Stored SL 8950, gap 1.6% — within tolerance. Keep current levels; no MODIFY needed → revert to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "BAJAJ-AUTO -1.4%, CMP 10602 vs SL 10440 (1.5% gap). Buyback at Rs 12000 record date May 29 provides floor; +103% PAT. Hold through current chop."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "DABUR -1.7%, CMP 479 vs SL 470 (1.9% gap). Q4 beat (PAT +15.75%), FY27 guidance raised. Within SL absorption budget."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1255.00,
      "new_target": 1320.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "LAURUSLABS +3.8%, CMP 1273 vs stored SL 1255 — gap is only 1.4%, at floor. No change to SL or target — values match stored, revert to HOLD per Rule 12."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "TATACONSUM +1.4% on +9.5% earnings surge today. CMP 1265 vs SL 1198 (5.3% gap — wider than needed but room for run to target 1330). Hold; will trail tomorrow on confirmation."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CGPOWER -0.5%, CMP 861 vs SL 850 (1.3% gap). Order book +61% YoY; near ATH. Within absorption budget."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "APOLLOHOSP +0%, CMP 8092 vs SL 7950 (1.8% gap). Q4 results May 20 — outside 3-session binary window. HSBC upgrade to TP 9000. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SUNPHARMA +0.3%, CMP 1872 vs SL 1830 (2.2% gap). Q4 May 21 — 7 sessions, outside binary window. Pharma defensive bid intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LALPATHLAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "LALPATHLAB -1.0%, CMP 1649 vs SL 1610 (2.4% gap). Research now BEARISH (modifier -0.10) on Tata 1mg threat + margin compression. Stock faded from intraday high 1698 to 1649. Allow SL to do its job — already inside risk budget; no new info since entry justifies preemptive exit (Rule 17)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TORNTPHARM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "TORNTPHARM +0.1%, CMP 4543 vs SL 4360 (4% gap). Sector top mover +3.9%. Q4 May 21 — outside 3-session window. JB Chemicals merger progressing. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Pending BUY 20x TATACONSUM CNC LIMIT @ 1240 from earlier in session — CMP now 1262, limit will not fill in current tape. Already hold 40 shares filled at 1248. Leaving the pending in place is fine; do not stack. No new order."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Safe-haven hedge; SL adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 838.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven+, target raised to 880 on record-high breakout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1365 already trailed and locks +8.4%; CMP-SL gap at 1.1% floor — cannot tighten further without breaching trail-gap rule."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Modest gain; SL gives 2.6% room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "At 52w high; SL 8950 already trails ~1.6% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Modest red; SL gap 1.5%, buyback floor at 12000 supports."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Within SL absorption."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1255 already locks +2.4%; gap 1.4% at floor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Big move today; await tomorrow confirmation before trailing tighter."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Near ATH; SL at 850."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Flat day; SL 1.8% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive pharma; Q4 7 sessions away."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LALPATHLAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Bearish research overlay flagged but SL absorbs; do not preempt own SL (Rule 17)."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPHARM",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Sector momentum strong; Q4 outside binary window."

  "watchlist_notes": "BULLISH candidates surfaced today: TATACONSUM (+0.10, already held + pending), DABUR (+0.10 — already held), BAJAJ-AUTO (+0.10 — already held), COFORGE (+0.10 — already held), APOLLOHOSP (+0.08 — already held), TORNTPHARM (+0.08 — already held), MARICO (+0.08 — already held). Every bullish candidate already represented in book. New names considered and rejected: THERMAX (+9% gap-up, extended, no clean entry), MCX (+5%, near 52w high, no pullback), KOTAKBANK (relative-strength but banking cluster weak — no add when sector down 1%), BHARATFORG (volume signal but tape risk-off into CPI). With VIX +8.7% and CPI tomorrow, holding admit-side flat is justified — Rule 18: explicit per-name rejects logged.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 55%, cash 45% — sits inside the soft 80% target with VIX-spike justification for the buffer. CPI print tomorrow is the binary macro event; running 14 names with 7 of them BULLISH-rated and trailing SLs in place is the right posture. Realized -28k today already; daily-loss room 50k remaining — defense priority. No new admits today is defensible given (a) VIX +8.7%, (b) Nifty -1.07%, (c) all qualifying BULLISH names already held, (d) tomorrow's CPI binary."
}
